summary: #60247 remains the best live canonical for the Control UI CJK WebSocket/display JSON parse failure. The other open hydrated refs are related streaming/non-ASCII JSON failures with distinct symptoms, channels, or implementation lanes, so no high-confidence close/comment/label mutation is planned.
